PublicGetValuationsResponse.description:
Response for public/get-valuations (HTTP 200/4xx/5xx).
code === 0 → success, result present.
code !== 0 → error, message and/or original present.

PublicStakingGetConversionRateResponse.description:
Response for public/staking/get-conversion-rate (HTTP 200/4xx/5xx).
code === 0 → success, result present.
code !== 0 → error, message and/or original
